name: DIFFUSE (MYELINOCLASTIC) SCLEROSIS
definition: MYELINOCLASTIC DIFFUSE SCLEROSIS = SCHILDER DISEASE rare demyelinating disorder with episodic recurrence + remission

demographics.Histo: selective confluent demyelination with relative axonal sparing, perivascular

discriminating_features: large well defined bilateral low-attenuation white matter lesions with mass effect

general: large well defined bilateral low-attenuation white matter lesions with mass effect
